title: sustoicheo #4960
definition:
1) to stand or march in the same row (file) with
    1a) of soldiers
    1b) to stand over against, be parallel with
    1c) to answer to, resemble
        1c1) so once of a type in the OT which answers to the antitype
             in the NT
nasbUsage:
